creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
A new minor version was released but:

1) The known problem of the lack of shared libs is caused by a bug in
/bin/sh and it doesn't seem a good idea to add a debendency on the pdksh
just to build them.

2) The fast version requires an assembler guru.

I suggest to suspend the port until both problems are fixed. If no one
tracks it, please close the PR.
